text.title: Serverless Cost Optimization Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure applying the serverless-cost-optimization methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: inventory-spend
step.action: Build per-function spend + memory + duration + RPS table.
step.decision-gate: Top-N covers > 80% of spend — focus there.

step.name: right-size-memory
step.action: Run Power Tuning; redeploy at lowest-cost memory meeting SLO.

step.name: audit-pc-utilisation
step.action: Remove or scale PC for functions with > 50% idle.

step.name: batch-and-reduce-downstream
step.action: Refactor per-item calls to batch APIs; reduce optional downstream calls.

step.name: tune-event-sources
step.action: Increase batch size + batch window to practical max.

step.name: compute-break-even
step.action: Compute monthly cost at current and projected RPS; compare to Fargate / Cloud Run.
step.output: Break-even RPS + container recommendation if applicable.

step.name: publish-report
step.action: Compose report with before/after numbers + review trigger.
